# The Sue Patti Group

> Lake Country Wisconsin real estate team at Realty Executives Integrity Lake Country. Sue Patti (Broker/Owner, 41 years experience, lead of the team) and Jason Patti (REALTOR, 21 years experience since 2005, 125 career sales). Combined 399 homes sold across Waukesha, Dodge, and Jefferson counties in Wisconsin. 60+ verified five-star Zillow team reviews.

The Sue Patti Group is a top-rated real estate team specializing in Lake Country and surrounding Wisconsin. Our tagline is "Discover Lake Country and Beyond" because our service area extends across 30 communities throughout three Wisconsin counties.

## About the team

**Sue Patti** is the Broker/Owner and Lead of The Sue Patti Group. She has 41 years of Lake Country real estate experience and lead of the team. Top Sales Leader at Realty Executives. Specializes in Buyer's Agency, Listing, Relocation, Foreclosure, Investment Properties, and Rentals.

**Jason Patti** is a REALTOR and member of The Sue Patti Group. Licensed in 2005 (21 years experience). 125 career sales. Moved to Delafield in 1994 and has lived in the Lake Country area ever since. Specializes in Buyer's Agency, Listing, Relocation, and New Construction.

## Direct contact

- **Realty Executives Jason:** https://www.realtyexecutives.com/agents/jason-patti

## Service areas (30 verified)

We serve 30 communities across three Wisconsin counties:

**Waukesha County:** Hartland (our office), Delafield (Jason's home since 1994), Oconomowoc, Pewaukee, Waukesha, Dousman, Mukwonago, Nashotah, Chenequa, Merton, Big Bend, Okauchee, North Lake, Lac La Belle, Oconomowoc Lake, Old Ashippun, Ottawa, Eagle, Erin, Summit, Vernon, Brookfield (zip 53045), Richfield

**Dodge County:** Neosho, Juneau, Ashippun

**Jefferson County:** Watertown, Ixonia

**Other:** Oak Creek, Colgate

760 Mill Pond Rd, Dousman WI 53118 - $764,900 - 5 bed, 4 bath, Single Family

## Specialties

- Lake Country real estate (Hartland, Delafield, Oconomowoc, Pewaukee)
- Lake homes and waterfront property
- Buyer agency
- Seller representation / Listing agent
- First-time home buyers
- Relocation services
- New construction (Jason)
- Foreclosure (Sue)
- Investment property (Sue)
- Rentals (Sue)
- Land sales (multiple recent closings)

## Track record

- **399** combined homes sold (per Zillow team profile)
- **41** years Sue's experience
- **21** years Jason's experience (licensed 2005)
- **5.0** star rating
- **60+** verified Zillow team reviews
- **17** Jason individual reviews
- **8** team sales last 12 months
- **$606K** Sue's average sale price
- **$401K** Jason's average sale price
- **$75K to $1.5M** career price range

## Sample real client reviews

"I have come to know Jason Patti as a man with high level of integrity, honesty, dependable and trustworthy." - nkuches2 (Waukesha, 2020)

"Sue Patti and her team provided us with extraordinary service in the sale of our former home and the purchase of our new home." - Hartland client (2020)

"Very detail oriented and will make sure everything is perfect. They do a lot to get your house sold quickly!" - Christian Morrissey (Hartland, 2020)

"We had an amazing experience working with Sue to buy a home! We felt like we were working with family." - n wollman (Pewaukee, 2020)

"Jason was incredible to work with! Attentive, prompt with follow up, and even went above and beyond to use his personal truck and trailer to help us move our appliances!" - marykay diderrich (Mukwonago, 2019)

## Response promise

When you contact us:
1. Text confirmation within 60 seconds
2. Email with information you need
3. Personal call from Jason within 15 minutes

## Key pages

- [Home](https://thesuepattigroup.ai/): Overview, lead chatbot, scrolling sales record, scrolling reviews
- [Search](https://thesuepattigroup.ai/search.html): Active listings + Zillow profile links
- [Neighborhoods](https://thesuepattigroup.ai/neighborhoods.html): Service-area deep dives across Lake Country
- [Oconomowoc Real Estate](https://thesuepattigroup.ai/oconomowoc.html): Most-worked Lake Country market. Lac La Belle, Oconomowoc Lake, downtown.
- [Dousman Real Estate](https://thesuepattigroup.ai/dousman.html): Country living with acreage, Kettle Moraine recreation access.
- [Ixonia Real Estate](https://thesuepattigroup.ai/ixonia.html): Jefferson County country properties with Oconomowoc school district access.
- [Sold Homes](https://thesuepattigroup.ai/sold-homes.html): All 15 recent verified sales with photos
- [Reviews](https://thesuepattigroup.ai/reviews.html): 12 verified Zillow reviews with full quotes
- [Home Valuation](https://thesuepattigroup.ai/home-valuation.html): Free home value estimate
- [About](https://thesuepattigroup.ai/about.html): Sue and Jason real bios
- [Contact](https://thesuepattigroup.ai/contact.html): Direct contact for both agents
